task: Retroactive evidence record for the pre-adoption k1 / k3 / k1-k3 non-uniform k-connectivity solution set (filenames dated 2024-09-15), consumed by plot_k1.m / plot_k3.m / plot_k1_k3.m. NOTE: the exact script that produced these files is not present in this repo -- Model/VariableK_MR.py computes k-connectivity solutions but never writes this CSV format (see CLAUDE.md Rule 5); provenance beyond 'consumed by' is unverified.
not_done: seeds not captured (random.seed(iterNo) is used inside Model/VariableK_MR.py and logged to stdout, but stdout was not retained for this historical run)
environment fingerprint not captured (Python/gurobipy/numpy versions unknown for the original run)
producer script not identified — Model/VariableK_MR.py does not write this CSV format; whatever did is not in this repo
provenance_note: This entry is retroactive, written during the 2026-07-06 Aletheia adoption, not at run time. 'git_commit' is the commit where these files entered THIS repository's history (the slimmed adoption-transcript subject), not the original research timeline — the files are dated 2024-09-15 by filename/context, years before this git history existed. The output_hashes_sha256 values are real, computed directly against the committed files. Everything else that would normally be captured live (seeds, environment, wall time) could not be reconstructed after the fact and is honestly listed under not_done rather than invented.
